description:
Cargo.toml line 20 declares `tokio = { workspace = true }` as a regular dependency, but in src/lib.rs the only use sites are three `#[tokio::test]` macros (lines 332, 346, 360). The runtime work in build_ssm_client goes through secretx_core::run_on_new_thread, not direct tokio APIs.

Fix: move tokio under [dev-dependencies] instead of [dependencies]. This will make the crate's published dep graph smaller and is identical to the 8bh8.1 finding for secretx-aws-sm (which has the exact same architecture).

Verification: grep -n tokio secretx-aws-ssm/src/lib.rs shows all 6 hits are doc comments or test macros.
title: secretx-aws-ssm: tokio is a regular dependency but used only for #[tokio::test]
